comments.body:
what is the id for `testuser`?

I don't see what is wrong there, `testuser` on the host simply is not mapped into the namespace for the user `rocky` that maps the id for `rocky` and the additional IDs [100000; 100000+65536-1]
Feel free to comment further, but I am closing the issue as I don't think this is a problem in Podman.
